producing_process: project-architect (PI) authoritative experiment-epic decomposition of the LEDGER decision chronicle (prose; no data/figure owed)
request_origin: selements-website repo — story-editor experiment-epic cut request (pre-planning structural backbone for episodes 03+; plan-free by design — no proposed arc was sent, to avoid anchoring)
deliverable_type: prose decomposition of record (PI epic cut + D-XX mapping + resource base + 6 fork rulings + non-claim confirmations); NOT a data export
source_documents: experiments/nerf/LEDGER.md — read in full (§1 Pulse, §3 decision log [D-01]..[D-74], §6 artifacts, §7 session history)
results/exports/selements-website/MANIFEST.md — couriered-set enumeration (what the consumer already holds)
verification: All 'verified on disk' artifact paths in the note were checked via filesystem enumeration this session (both by the PI agent and independently by the export courier); paths flagged 'LEDGER-cited, not re-verified' were not. Load-bearing numbers independently cross-checked against LEDGER §1/§3 by the courier: P_F residuals 0.4155/0.3757/0.3592/0.3613, R in [18.87,23.75], D1-D4 signatures, K2 0.0026 vs 0.0101, grid P_F 0.0352, xi 0.0075 vs ceiling 0.0298, G=192, Wiener >=0.079, A1 var-ratios 2.5e-6..6.6e-6, skip-rich Wilcoxon p=1.0.
verb_ceiling: [D-37] honest-reporting + [D-73] close-out. Claim-bearing: the epic cut restates results-of-record with their binding caveats (integrator slack on the 4x; ceiling-relative ~25% under a demoted estimator; verdicts-not-magnitudes on grid-vs-MLP; z=0.3 + FGPA forward-model scope-lock; fails-2-of-3-directly-evaluated, never all-three; four axes never twelve; 192^3 never 48^3).
internal_identifier_note: DELIBERATE EXCEPTION per registered precedent (narrative-arc-honesty-review 2026-06-29, tomography-framing-check 2026-07-07): this note is editorial backbone for the story-editor and carries [D-XX] tags, LEDGER section pointers, run codenames, and R-rule references BY REQUEST — the request explicitly asks for the D-** mapping as binding data. These identifiers are BARRED from published episode copy and figure art; the note's header restates the scrub obligation to the consumer.
honest_caveat: This is the PI's decomposition of the decision chronicle, not new science: 8 experiment epics (ep03 pub-t1 anchored run; ep04-ep07 the four intervention axes D1-D4; ep08 trainability wall grouped; ep09 A1 head probe; ep10 grid-probe close-out), Stage-3 ruled a separate satellite, Two-Pass Surrogate + degeneracy/anchor mechanism ruled into ep02 with the anchor value-correction saga in ep03. Fork rulings and the epic/D-XX/resource mapping are binding on structure; storytelling remains selements'. Single realization, Sherwood P1 fiducial, 60 cMpc/h box, z=0.3 scope-lock throughout.

amendments.summary: Amendment 1 (PI): Fork 4 amended (lesson-building cedes ep02->ep03); [D-38] assigned ep03 D-internal with broken-0.877-anchor provenance caveat; old-numbering addendum for the narrative-arc-honesty-review (old ep02=new ep03; old ep03/ep04=new ep10 jointly).

Amendment 2 (PI): ep05 factual completion — Tier-1 ratification (Juno 197381, 25k steps) of the smoke FAIL; collapse signature attributed to the Tier-1 checkpoint; N-x-worse multiples barred against the ceiling-saturated pf residual (LEDGER 10x slip recorded); resources add item4 JSON + tier1 checkpoint. Plus ruling: [D-42-meta] item 2 binds paper-register shape claims; published ep04 stands, resolution hedge licensed for future assertive restatements.
